decision: Reject any proposal that introduces, restores, or requires active top-level specs-main.
forbiddenAuthorityClaims: proposal contract canonical path under active specs-main
mergeBehavior: fail-before-semantic-merge for active specs-main; historical/quarantine evidence may remain non-authoritative
rationale: package/build authority is governance-records plus generated feat inputs
specs-main revival would violate final boundary and create a second source of truth
scope: all proposal merge/admission decisions after this SSOT merge
